name: xcpSetCalPage
title: xcpSetCalPage
description: If the XCP slave device supports calibration data page switching, this command sets the current page and access mode.
The callback returns that the ECU switched the calibration data page.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device, configured within the CANoeXCP/CCP Window.

parameters.name: Bit 7
parameters.description: Use for all segments, i.e. parameter segmentNr is ignored.

parameters.name: Bit 1
parameters.description: The slave device XCP driver will access the given page.

parameters.name: Bit 0
parameters.description: The given page will be used by the slave device application.

parameters.name: segmentNr
parameters.description: Logical data segment number. Ignored if bit 7 of the mode parameter is set to 1.

parameters.name: pageNr
parameters.description: Logical data page number. Usually 0 identifies the page in RAM and 1 the page in FLASH memory. CANoe.XCP can only work on parameters stored in RAM.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
